title: YC's AI Era Startup Ideas: AI-Native Services, Personalized ...
full_text:
YC just dropped their list of startup ideas they want to fund in the AI era. Worth reading if you're building or investing right now.
Three on the list hit exactly where my own thesis sits.
#2 AI-Native Services Companies. We're watching a structural merger happen in real time — product and services companies are collapsing into one category. The future isn't pure SaaS. It's services businesses that use AI products to deliver outcomes. Not just software that solves a problem, but companies that actually do the work.
#3 AI Personalised Medicine. By 2030, we'll look back at 2025 medicine as something out of the stoneages. Right now, a 60-year-old woman and a 25-year-old man with the same diagnosis get the same drug at the same dose. That's insane. AI is about to end that. Every treatment will be built around the individual, not the average patient.
#4 The Company Brain. Every business runs on context — industry nuance, internal language, how decisions actually get made. Without that context, AI agents are just expensive autocomplete. Every company will need a Company Brain. Probably more than one — one per department, maybe more. This is a massive infrastructure opportunity hiding in plain sight.
YC gets early access to how the future is being built. When they publish a thesis like this, it's worth taking seriously.
Scary and exciting in equal measure. But this is the map. | 22 comments on LinkedIn
